→ R<sub>B</sub> → Base<br>AWG CH1 → R<sub>SENSE</sub> → Collector<br>ADC CH0 = V<sub>BE</sub> | ADC CH1 = V<sub>CE</sub><br>Force I<sub>B</sub>, Sense I<sub>C</sub> = ΔV / R<sub>SENSE</sub>" Steps)&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;<b>h<sub>FE</sub>-I<sub>C</sub></b> (120 Log-Spaced Points)&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;<b>I<sub>C</sub>-V<sub>BE</sub></b> Transfer<br><b>V<sub>CE(sat)</sub>-I<sub>C</sub></b> (Kelvin C-E)&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;<b>V<sub>BE(sat)</sub>-I<sub>C</sub></b> (Kelvin style="swimlane;startSize=32;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#ea580c;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#c2410c;rounded=0;collapsible=0;" value="⑤ Signal Processing Pipeline — 3-Stage Metrology-Grade Filtering" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="760" x="20" y="1075" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5a" parent="g5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#ea580c;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">① 3σ Outlier Rejection</b><br><br>2048 Raw ADC Samples<br>Remove Points &gt; 3σ from Mean<br>Suppress Impulse Noise" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="215" x="25" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_5ato5b" edge="1" parent="g5" source="n5a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#ea580c;" target="n5b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5b" parent="g5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#ea580c;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">② 5% Trimmed Mean</b><br><br>Discard Top &amp; Bottom 5%<br>Average Central 1844 Points<br>Robust DC Estimate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="215" x="272" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_5bto5c" edge="1" parent="g5" source="n5b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#ea580c;" target="n5c"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5c" parent="g5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#ea580c;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">③ Savitzky-Golay Filter</b><br><br>Window = 11, Polyorder = 3<br>Applied to Sweep Curve Data<br>Smooth While Preserving Peaks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="215" x="519" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="calc5" parent="g5" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;align=center;fontStyle=2;" value="Derived Calculations: I<sub>B</sub> = (V<sub>AWG</sub> - V<sub>BE</sub>) / 1kΩ&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;I<sub>C</sub> = (V<sub>CE_set</sub> - V<sub>CE_meas</sub>) / 100Ω&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;h<sub>FE</sub> = I<sub>C</sub> / I<sub>B</sub>&nbsp;&nbsp;|&nbsp;&nbsp;I<sub>leak</sub> = V<sub>out</sub> / 10MΩ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="710" x="25" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea_5to6" edge="1" Visualization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="195" width="760" x="20" y="1330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6a" parent="g6" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2563EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">PyQt5 Desktop GUI</b><br><br>Real-Time Parameter Table<br>Progress Bar + Log Window<br>Device Preset Manager<br>PASS/FAIL Color Coding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="128" width="230" x="22" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6b" parent="g6" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2563EB;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">Excel Report g.text: ① Hardware Platform — Raindrop Model3 On-Chip Instrumentation

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Raindrop Model3 SoC Core
2-ch AWG (0–5V DC Output)
2-ch ADC (1 MHz, 2048-pt Buffer)
Integrated DMM + Digital I/O
USB FTDI Interface

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 343px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 501px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Breadboard Test Fixture
RBASE = 1kΩ (Base Drive)
RSENSE = 100Ω (Collector Sense)
RLEAK = 10MΩ (Transimpedance Amp)
Manual Circuit Switching (3 Topologies)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 253, 244), rgb(15, 26, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

g.text: ② Test Circuit Topologies (3 Configurations, Manual Switching)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 131px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Circuit A — hFE Measurement
AWG CH0 → RB → Base
AWG CH1 → RSENSE → Collector
ADC CH0 = VBE | ADC CH1 = VCE
Force IB, Sense IC = ΔV / RSENSE

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 376px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Circuit B — Kelvin 4-Wire Saturation
Force-Sense Wire Separation
Kelvin C–E → VCE(sat)
Kelvin B–E → VBE(sat)
Eliminates Wiring & Contact Resistance

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 621px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Circuit C — Transimpedance Leakage
Rf = 10MΩ Feedback Resistor
ADC → Picoammeter (1mV = 100pA)
ICBO @ VCB = 5V
ICEO @ VCE = 5V
